title: BWA Website
summary: Responsive marketing site for a small PC building business selling pre-built PCs.

details.problem: The business needed a clean site that looks trustworthy and works well on mobile.
details.solution: Designed and built a fast landing-style website with clear sections and calls to action.

title: Gadget Labs Website
summary: Responsive ecommerce-style site concept for a business that sells electronics.

details.problem: Show products in a modern layout that feels like a real store experience.
details.solution: Built a responsive layout with strong typography, clean sections, and a consistent UI.

title: Trading Algo
summary: MetaTrader 5 (MT5) demo/paper trading bot project with docs, config examples, scripts, and tests.

details.problem: Run a configurable demo/paper trading bot for MT5 with a clear dev workflow and documentation.
details.solution: Organized a Python codebase with config templates, environment checks, and a simple CLI entry to run the bot.

title: Health Hub
summary: Offline-first personal health tracker built with Kotlin + Jetpack Compose (Material 3).

details.problem: Track gym, diet, and progress in one place, even when offline.
details.solution: Built an offline-first Android app with multiple flows and a clean, modern UI using Compose.

title: Offline Voice Assistant
summary: Offline voice assistant using speech recognition, text-to-speech, and a local LLM (GPT4All).

details.problem: Hands-free interaction without relying on a cloud-only assistant.
details.solution: Built a local voice loop that listens, transcribes, generates responses with a local model, and speaks back.
